query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `aiCallLog` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `callType` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `calledAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_aiCallLog_userId_calledAt` (`userId`, `calledAt`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3S5EK7kkwn3cfqa.root --database g6HPzuQNwUJzsGs4mHVNkx --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `aiCallLog` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `callType` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `calledAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_aiCallLog_userId_calledAt` (`userId`, `calledAt`)
);
